title: What YouTube Actually Pays Real Estate Creators

transcript.text: If the finance niche is the king of CPMs, then real estate might just be the [music] emperor. This is a niche where we're looking at CPM ranges from $10 all the way up to $30 per 1,000 views. Here are a couple of interesting strategies we're seeing in 2026 in this niche. Content has shifted from just showing mansions to market crisis advocacy. [music] And the breakout stars right now in this niche are using local urgency. If you look at this channel, The American Housing Analyst, with just 5 and 1/2 thousand subscribers, they're hitting tens of thousands of views constantly. By naming specific cities and regions and using data to predict wipe outs, crashes, and water shortages, it is quite a pivot from the why to buy this house type of content that we're all used to. But it is honest content. As a niche, this is STF for me.
